en: If your company is required to comply with Colombia Occupational Health and Safety Management System SG-SST requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form.
Colombia Occupational Health and Safety Management System SG-SST Applicability Assessment

The SG-SST Work Plan is a document created by the company that outlines the concrete activities, deadlines, assigned personnel, resources, and measurable goals for the company’s Occupational Health and Safety Management System during a 12-month period.

The SG-SST Policy is a formal expression of a company's commitment to occupational health and safety, created by the company itself. It sets the guiding principles for risk prevention and continuous improvement, signed by top management, and communicated to all employees.

Colombia Resolution 0312 Colombia Decree 1072
Is your company required to comply with Colombia’s Occupational Health and Safety Management System (SG-SST) regulations and maintain an SG-SST Work Plan as required by the Ministry of Labor?
Yes
No
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from maintaining an SG-SST Work Plan.
The company is a sole proprietorship with no other employees.
Other
The company does not have any employees in Colombia.
If "other," please explain.
